title: SUBSTANCE USE COUNSELING AND DUII EDUCATION - 211info
text: PHOENIX COUNSELING CENTER INC SUBSTANCE USE COUNSELING AND DUII EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers state certified DUII treatment program, parenting classes, and support groups. Also provides substance use counseling. 149 S Main Street Phoenix, OR 97535 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-7pm Email (541) 535-4133 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 535-4133 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an intake appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, sliding scale fees available for uninsured individuals DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fee. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Substance Use Counseling: Jackson County DUII offender program: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On Main Street/Highway 99 just past the 1st Street intersection on the left side, just before the one-way turns back into two ways. Rogue Valley Transit District bus stop nearby. Services: DUI Offender Programs Parenting Skills Classes * Substance Use Disorder Issues Substance Use Disorder Counseling Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Ex-Offenders Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Mothers Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - CO-OCCURRING CONDITIONS COUNSELING SETTINGS - MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PHOENIX COUNSELING CENTER INC
